title: SAW IMPL Manifest
description: Schema for the Scout-and-Wave IMPL manifest document. Describes the full structure of a parallel implementation plan including waves, agents, file ownership, and completion reports.

title.description: Human-readable title of the feature being implemented.

feature_slug.description: URL-safe identifier for the feature (used in branch names and file paths).

verdict.description: Scout's assessment of whether the feature is suitable for parallel implementation.

suitability_assessment.description: Prose explanation of the suitability verdict.

test_command.description: Command to run the project's test suite.

lint_command.description: Command to run the project's linter.

file_ownership.description: Maps each file to the agent and wave responsible for it.

interface_contracts.description: Contracts defining expected interfaces between agents.

waves.description: Ordered list of execution waves. Agents within a wave run in parallel; waves execute sequentially.

quality_gates.description: Quality checks that must pass before a wave is considered complete.

post_merge_checklist.description: Verification steps to run after merging all waves.

scaffolds.description: Type scaffold files created before wave execution for shared references.

completion_reports.description: Completion reports keyed by agent ID.

stub_reports.description: Stub scan results keyed by agent ID.

pre_mortem.description: Risk analysis of potential failure modes identified during scouting.

known_issues.description: Issues discovered during scouting with status and workarounds.

state.description: Current protocol state of this IMPL manifest.

merge_state.description: Current state of the merge operation for the active wave.

worktrees_created_at.description: Timestamp when worktrees were created (used for E2/I2-02 freeze enforcement).

frozen_contracts_hash.description: Hash of interface contracts at freeze time for drift detection.

frozen_scaffolds_hash.description: Hash of scaffolds at freeze time for drift detection.

completion_date.description: Date when the IMPL was completed (YYYY-MM-DD format).

FileOwnership.description: Maps a file to its owning agent and wave.

file.description: Relative file path from repo root.

agent.description: Agent ID (single uppercase letter, optionally followed by digit 2-9).

wave.description: Wave number this file belongs to.

action.description: What the agent will do with this file.

depends_on.description: List of file paths this file depends on.

Wave.description: A concurrent execution phase containing multiple agents.

agents.description: Agents executing in parallel within this wave.

base_commit.description: Git commit SHA recorded when worktrees were created.

Agent.description: A single concurrent task within a wave.

id.description: Unique agent identifier (e.g., A, B, C2).

task.description: Description of what this agent should implement.

files.description: Files this agent owns and may modify.

dependencies.description: Agent IDs this agent depends on (from prior waves).

model.description: Preferred model for this agent (optional override).

CompletionReport.description: Records the outcome of an agent's work.

status.description: Final status of the agent's work.

branch.description: Git branch name used by the agent.

commit.description: Final commit SHA of the agent's work.

files_created.description: Files newly created by the agent.

interface_deviations.description: Any deviations from the planned interface contracts.

out_of_scope_deps.description: Dependencies discovered outside the agent's scope.

tests_added.description: Test names added by the agent.

verification.description: Verification gate result (e.g., PASS, FAIL with details).

failure_type.description: Type of failure when status is partial or blocked.

notes.description: Free-form notes about decisions, surprises, or warnings.

InterfaceDeviation.description: Records a deviation from a planned interface contract.

description.description: What changed from the planned interface.

downstream_action_required.description: Whether downstream agents need to adapt to this change.

affects.description: Agent IDs affected by this deviation.

InterfaceContract.description: Defines an expected interface between agents.

name.description: Name of the interface or API.

definition.description: The interface definition (e.g., function signature, type definition).

location.description: File path where this interface is defined.

required.description: Whether this gate must pass for the wave to succeed.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this gate checks.

ScaffoldFile.description: A type scaffold file for shared references across agents.

file_path.description: Relative path for the scaffold file.

import_path.description: Import path for the scaffold (e.g., Go package path).

status.description: Whether the scaffold has been committed to the repo.

commit.description: Commit SHA when scaffold was committed.

PreMortem.description: Risk analysis of potential failure modes.

overall_risk.description: Overall risk level for this implementation.

PreMortemRow.description: A single failure scenario and its mitigation.

mitigation.description: How to prevent or handle this scenario.

PostMergeChecklist.description: Verification steps to run after merging all waves.

ChecklistGroup.description: A logical grouping of related checklist items.

command.description: Optional command to run for verification.

ScanStubsResult.description: Results from scanning agent files for stub patterns.

hits.description: Stub patterns found in agent files.

pattern.description: Stub pattern that matched (e.g., TODO, FIXME).
